name: Black Heed
description:
Very, VERY evil variant of Miss Heed. I'm actually at a loss of words for this one... (ok, she might not actually be that evil).

-I managed to add Dr. Flug, Demencia and 5.0.5 as well...! I was brief about each of them, so there may be some inaccuracies here and there. If that's the case, feel free to point it out.

-I defined Flug's appearance in case you want to take his paper bag off (although I don't know why would you even want to) (Obviously I don't know how he actually looks, and I'm not pretending to be a prophet at all lol)

-Now that I think about it... I didn't used to be like this, so obsessed with a fictional character. Will I ever stop?, probably not... this is the path I chose, and I'll stick to it until the bitter end...
creator: Val0302
